'''鈭歽-v-n''' ('''yavana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knap|knap]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-v-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knap|knap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-v-n
|-
! Lemma
| yavana
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yavanithi|yavanithi]] || [[word:yavaniji|yavaniji]] || [[word:yavanishi|yavanishi]] || [[word:yavani|yavani]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yavanuthuth|yavanuthuth]] || [[word:yavanujuj|yavanujuj]] || [[word:yavanushush|yavanushush]] || [[word:yavan|yavan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yavanuthu|yavanuthu]] || [[word:yavanuju|yavanuju]] || [[word:yavanushu|yavanushu]] || [[word:yavanu|yavanu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yavanufuth|yavanufuth]] || [[word:yavanufuj|yavanufuj]] || [[word:yavanufush|yavanufush]] || [[word:yavanuf|yavanuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yavanethe|yavanethe]] || [[word:yavaneje|yavaneje]] || [[word:yavaneshe|yavaneshe]] || [[word:yavane|yavane]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yavanothoth|yavanothoth]] || [[word:yavanojoj|yavanojoj]] || [[word:yavanoshosh|yavanoshosh]] || [[word:yavan|yavan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yavanotho|yavanotho]] || [[word:yavanojo|yavanojo]] || [[word:yavanosho|yavanosho]] || [[word:yavano|yavano]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yavanofoth|yavanofoth]] || [[word:yavanofoj|yavanofoj]] || [[word:yavanofosh|yavanofosh]] || [[word:yavanof|yavanof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yavan忙th忙|yavan忙th忙]] || [[word:yavan忙j忙|yavan忙j忙]] || [[word:yavan忙sh忙|yavan忙sh忙]] || [[word:yavan忙|yavan忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yavanathath|yavanathath]] || [[word:yavanajaj|yavanajaj]] || [[word:yavanashash|yavanashash]] || [[word:yavan|yavan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yavanatha|yavanatha]] || [[word:yavanaja|yavanaja]] || [[word:yavanasha|yavanasha]] || [[word:yavana|yavana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yavanafath|yavanafath]] || [[word:yavanafaj|yavanafaj]] || [[word:yavanafash|yavanafash]] || [[word:yavanaf|yavanaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yavanasha|yavanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyavanasha|goyavanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyavanasha|gokiyavanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yavan眉sha|yavan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyavankn眉sha|goyavankn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyavan眉sha|gokiyavan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yavansh毛sha|yavansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyavanksh毛sha|goyavanksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyavansh毛sha|gokiyavansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yavanrosha|yavanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyavankrosha|goyavankrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyavanrosha|gokiyavanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yavanmusha|yavanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyavankmusha|goyavankmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyavanmusha|gokiyavanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yavansherasha|yavansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyavanksherasha|goyavanksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyavansherasha|gokiyavansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yavangasha|yavangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyavankngasha|goyavankngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyavangasha|gokiyavangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yavanyasha|yavanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyavankyasha|goyavankyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyavanyasha|gokiyavanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yavanyamasha|yavanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyavankyamasha|goyavankyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyavanyamasha|gokiyavanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yavan眉sh毛sha|yavan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyavankn眉sh毛sha|goyavankn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyavan眉sh毛sha|gokiyavan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yavan眉rosha|yavan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyavankn眉rosha|goyavankn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyavan眉rosha|gokiyavan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yavan眉musha|yavan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyavankn眉musha|goyavankn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyavan眉musha|gokiyavan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yavansh毛n眉sha|yavansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyavanksh毛n眉sha|goyavanksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyavansh毛n眉sha|gokiyavansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yavansh毛rosha|yavansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyavanksh毛rosha|goyavanksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyavansh毛rosha|gokiyavansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yavansh毛musha|yavansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyavanksh毛musha|goyavanksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyavansh毛musha|gokiyavansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yavanron眉sha|yavanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyavankron眉sha|goyavankron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyavanron眉sha|gokiyavanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yavanrosh毛sha|yavanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyavankrosh毛sha|goyavankrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyavanrosh毛sha|gokiyavanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yavanromusha|yavanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyavankromusha|goyavankromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyavanromusha|gokiyavanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yavanmun眉sha|yavanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyavankmun眉sha|goyavankmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyavanmun眉sha|gokiyavanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yavanmush毛sha|yavanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyavankmush毛sha|goyavankmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyavanmush毛sha|gokiyavanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yavanmurosha|yavanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyavankmurosha|goyavankmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyavanmurosha|gokiyavanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yavan|yavan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:y忙v忙n|y忙v忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyavan|hoyavan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoy忙v忙n|hoy忙v忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyavan|hohoyavan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoy忙v忙n|hohoy忙v忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉yavan|n眉yavan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉y忙v忙n|n眉y忙v忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉yavan|n眉n眉yavan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉y忙v忙n|n眉n眉y忙v忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂yavan|n茂yavan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂y忙v忙n|n茂y忙v忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂yavan|n茂n茂yavan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂y忙v忙n|n茂n茂y忙v忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyavan|luyavan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luy忙v忙n|luy忙v忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyavan|luluyavan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluy忙v忙n|luluy忙v忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyavan|liyavan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liy忙v忙n|liy忙v忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyavan|liliyavan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliy忙v忙n|liliy忙v忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyavan|koyavan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koy忙v忙n|koy忙v忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyavan|kokoyavan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoy忙v忙n|kokoy忙v忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyavan|keyavan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:key忙v忙n|key忙v忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyavan|kekeyavan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekey忙v忙n|kekey忙v忙n]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
